feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: What is the difference between Length, Decimal Places, Output Length?
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

Does "Length" or "Output Length" determine the maximum length that a variable type can have?
Does Output Length mean including the value after the comma (decimal)? Or is it length?
What is the maximum value I can give for this domain? Can I show the value 1234567891234.12?
Where should I look for the integer part?

 




 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Is there a possibility to set default Item Category based on Incoterms entered at Sales Order level?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, 

The requirement: When creating a sales order that includes incoterms, the item category on the item line should default to YXXX. Also please also let me know if we can do something in the sales contract to avoid enhancement.

As per my research I did not find any blog or answers related to my requirement. Can anyone tell me is this possible? 

Regards,

Vardhan K

#SAP SD SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: BAPI to Cancel specific line items from billing document
entry.content: I have a Billing Document having 10 Line items and I want to cancel 2 line items out of it. VF11 provides facility to select specific line items and process it for cancellation. I am looking for a BAPI for above purpose to use in custom program.

entry.title: How to use EXIT in substitution OBBH if form parameter C_EXIT_PARAM_CLASS is used
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating a substitution in OBBH at Call Point 3 i.e. Complete Document. I need to update few fields in BSEG table so I have used exit U102 in the substitution exit form pool like below. 

In this exit, parameter C_EXIT_PARAM_CLASS is used so that complete details from bkpf and bseg can be retrieved and necessary changes can be made. After updating exit form pool, I have run program RGUGBR00 to generate all respective substitution programs.

While creating substitution in OBBH, I have selected Exit option to substitute the value of the required field form bseg table like below. But Exit U102 (as provided in form exit pool) is not available in exit list i.e. F4 and I am not able to choose the same. Kindly help me what wrong I have done or is there anything I have missed.

Regards

Sameer Sharma

entry.title: Create a Custom Copy of T-code VD05:
entry.content:
Hello All, 
I have to create a custom copy of T code VD05 to enhance it based on user requirements.
I have copied SAP standard Program working behind VD05 (SAPMF02D) and created a Z transaction(ZVD05) but my program is not executing.
I have copied via SE38 and copied screens.
Program is successfully activated but not getting executed.
Any help with correct process to copy VD05 ( screen 507 of SAPMF02D) is helpful!
Regards,

Łukasz

entry.title: Placing ACH file to AL11 when payment is ran in F110
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to place the ACH file to AL11 when Automatic payment ran thru F110, I created the Event 21 for the payment medium format and created a Z FM ZFI_PAYMEDIUM_SAMPLE_21 and assigned in the event modules.

But, I'm not getting the complete data in the table when event 21 is triggered. Can you guys suggest me to achieve this?

 

Thank You,

Venu.

entry.title: Issues with CJ40 BAPI and Plan data not getting populated
entry.content:
Hello

Need a help as we are facing issues with the CJ40 update when using the BAPI "BAPI_COSTACTPLN_POSTPRIMCOST". 

Business requirement - To maintain the plan values at WBS level and Primary cost GL accounts

We receive a file with the WBS code and GL accounts along with usual amount, currency etc. When we try to process the file, the plan values gets correctly updated along with the GL codes but the field "Cost plan" is not updated which contains the totaled-up value of the lower level WBS. Our project profile contains only Annual values. 

Please suggest as we are totally lost here. We are not sure if another BAPI needs to be called to fill in the "Cost plan" field or something else. 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Enhancement for availability check in material reservation (MB21)
entry.content:
Dears,
I have a requirement to set an error message when the stock is not available during reservation (MB21) for a certain plan, while for other plants/by default should be only warning message in that case.

That message I can set in standard configuration for Availability Check for Reservation (OMB1) -> Movement Type -> Dynamic avail. check: A-for warning, B-for error (Message no. M7181). It's OK, however it's for a movement type, globally. I need A-warning by default for my movement type, but B-error for the same movement type but while reservation for a certain plant (RESB-WERKS).

Is there any user exit or enhancement to do that?

Reagrds

entry.title: Attach copy of purchase order when it's changed in ME22N
entry.content:
Hello all,

In our PRD system, when a change is made to a Purchase order, a copy of the print version of the po is saved under the Attachment List in the po Services for Objects area.  This isn't happening in our Test system.  I don't know how this is done.  So, my question is, is this in the output program, is it configuration? We have a modified version of program SAPFM06P, subroutine ENTRY_NEU in our Test system but not in PRD.  

To be clear, I have seen several posts regarding manually attaching documents but this happens automatically when a change is made.  

Thank you 

#Services for Objects
#Attachment List

entry.title: Attach copy of purchase order when it's changed in ME22N
entry.content:
In our PRD system, when a change is made to a Purchase order, a copy of the print version of the po is saved under the Attachment List in the po Services for Objects area.  This isn't happening in our Test system. 

I don't know how this is done.  So, my question is, is this in the output program, is it configuration? We have a modified version of program SAPFM06P, subroutine ENTRY_NEU in our Test system but not in PRD.  

To be clear, I have seen several posts regarding manually attaching documents but this happens automatically when a change is made.  

 

Thank you for any help.

entry.title: ZARIXBC3 deletion taking very long -using program RSAINDDL
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to delete the entries from table ZARIXBC3(Change documents). 

Steps: SARJ=> ZCHANGEDOCU => Environment => Fill Structure

Select any file click on delete structure and schedule it as a background job. 

Even if we select a single file, the jobs runs for more than a day and canceled. 

I have tried delete entries for other objects like MM_MATBEL and MM_EKKO and the job is quick. 

Please share the options or solutions to make it quicker.

entry.title: Extending the ABAP CDS extractor
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a question of extending the ABAP CDS extractor.

Requirement - Extend the ABAP CDS extractor I_GoodsMovementDocumentDEX with fields from MATDOC table. 

The view I_GoodsMovementDocumentDEX is created on I_MaterialDocumentRecord which in turn is created on MATDOC. Do we first create a extension view for I_MaterialDocumentRecord and have the required fields from MATDOC. Followed by one more extension view for I_GoodsMovementDocumentDEX to add those fields , or we directly add those fields in I_GoodsMovementDocumentDEX without extension view as it is already available in underlying view.

Is it recommended to change standard CDS view I_GoodsMovementDocumentDEX ? or we have to use the 2 separate extension view as mentioned above?

Thanks,

Vinay

entry.title: Include Description on my Report
entry.content:
Hello everyone , 

i make a Report and i want to take on my column the description and not the Code from Field data.

My example : 

i want to my Last Column into the Report , to see the material Group .

Now i can see the Code into my report and not the Description.

How can i change my abap Code to take the description of these ?

 

 

*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*& Report ZALMM_STOCK_REPORT
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
*&
*&---------------------------------------------------------------------*
REPORT zalmm_stock_report.

TABLES : kna1, knb1, mvke, mara, mard.


SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK sel_block WITH FRAME TITLE TEXT-s00.
  PARAMETERS     : plant  TYPE bukrs OBLIGATORY DEFAULT '',
                 SALS_ORG TYPE vkorg OBLIGATORY DEFAULT ''.

SELECT-OPTIONS : cr_date2 FOR mara-ersda,
                 matnr    FOR mara-matnr.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK sel_block.

DATA:gr_alv       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table,
     gr_functions TYPE REF TO cl_salv_functions_list.


  SELECT mara~matnr,maktx,marc~werks,marc~lgpro, mard~labst ,meins , /CWM/LABST,EINME, /cwm/valum,BWESB,TRAME,MVGR1,MVGR4
    FROM mara
    INNER JOIN makt on makt~matnr = mara~matnr and makt~spras = 'G'
    LEFT JOIN mvke ON mvke~matnr = mara~matnr AND mvke~vkorg = SALS_ORG
    LEFT JOIN marc ON marc~matnr = mara~matnr AND marc~werks = plant
    LEFT JOIN mard ON mard~matnr = mara~matnr AND marc~werks = plant
    WHERE marc~werks = plant
      AND mvke~vkorg = SALS_ORG
      AND mara~ersda IN cr_date2
      AND mara~matnr IN matnr
    INTO TABLE DATA(mmm).


  CALL METHOD cl_salv_table=>factory
    IMPORTING
      r_salv_table = gr_alv
    CHANGING
      t_table      = mmm.


gr_functions = gr_alv->get_functions( ).
gr_functions->set_all( abap_true ).
gr_alv->display( ).

entry.title: Partner number issue in IDOC - sending and receiving in same system
entry.content:
Dear all,

I created new partner number in logical system (Tcode- SALE) as well as new port in WE21. 

I am sending a IDOC within same system. In this process, Outbound IDOC is successful with correct partner number but the inbound IDOC don't have the partner number that I created. IDOC getting created with standard partner number with error Partner profile does not exist.

Partner profile added under Logical system in newly created partner number with correct process code.

#IDOC

entry.title: Fetch data when clicked on ALV cell icon
entry.content:
Hi all,

When clicked on 'START' icon it should fetch Start Date and Start Time of respective row

When clicked on 'END' icon it should fetch End Date and End Time of respective row, how this can be done?

entry.title: Error is: No component exists with the name "FOR".
entry.content:
Question title is the error I get in complier:

I simply want to concatenate all BAPI error messages, I can do with Reduce maybe.
but now I am curious why am I getting error.

ls_head is a structure with fields MSGTYP, MESSAGE(char1024) etc..
I understand that another ( ) after FOR essentially means creating rows with every loop which is obviously wrong but I get error for the line above it first.

Code below:

 

DATA: ls_head TYPE ZSK_S_VBAK. 

ls_head = VALUE #( FOR IN lt_return2 WHERE ( type = 'E' ) 
       ( message = message && lc_semicol && -message ) ).

entry.title: why cant I use BASE while declaring table inline?
entry.content:
hello experts,

here lt_schdx will only have only line because every time a new line is added, old ones are removed.
if I had table declared beforehand I could use BASE but it's not allowed here.
any alternative because BASE statement is not allowed, my code below:

LOOP AT lt_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_item>).

DATA(lt_schdx) =
VALUE cod_t_bapischdlx( ( updateflag = 'I'
          itm_number = COND #( WHEN <ls_item>-posnr IS NOT INITIAL THEN 'X' )
          sched_line = '0001'
          req_date   = COND #( WHEN <ls_item>-edatu IS NOT INITIAL THEN 'X' )
          date_type  = 'X'
          req_qty    = 'X' ) ).

ENDLOOP.

entry.title: sap GUI is not supported in trl_en
entry.content:
While I am learning ABAP on BTP Cloud. I came across this error.

I have created a Z table in Eclipse BTP ABAP trial account. I want Open that table in sap GUI. 

can anyone help me

SAP BTP, Kyma runtime ABAP Cloud

entry.title: Can't we use MOVE-CORRESPONDING ITAB TO ITAB in the function?
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

I want to transfer the internal table in the code to the function table using move-corresponding, but this is not allowed.I made many tryings. Where am I making a mistake?


Scenario 1 : 

 

 

Scenario 2 :

 

Thanks

entry.title: Change Column name on my Report
entry.content:
Hello everyone , 

i make my Report from SE38 Transaction.

On my code i select some Field from Tables.

 SELECT mara~matnr,maktx,marc~werks,marc~lgpro, mard~labst ,meins , /CWM/LABST,EINME, /cwm/valum,BWESB,TRAME, TVM1T~BEZEI, TVM4T~BEZEI AS TEMP
    FROM mara
    INNER JOIN etc......

I want to rename TVM1T~BEZEI, TVM4T~BEZEI  when i execute the report with my Names.

Who can i do ?

Now when i Execute i take the same Field Names "Description"
